'''Varesh''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]].

While on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], Varesh heard the retelling of the story of how the shamed [[Warrior caste|warrior]] [[Vua Rapuung]] had come to accept the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] and helped [[Anakin Solo]]. He later relayed the story to [[Vuurok I'pan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1stm}}
